articles.title: $131 Billion Bitcoin Moving Suggests Large Entities Are Buying $BTC Over the Counter
articles.description: On-chain crypto analytics firm CryptoQuant has revealed on social media that earlier this month a total of $131 billion worth of bitcoin were moved in a single day, with only 1% of that amount being deposits and withdrawals to cryptocurrency exchanges. The firm’s bitcoin exchanges fund flow ratio, which measures the ratio of BTC transactions […]

articles.title: Chainlink Is Building a Billion-Dollar Bridge to a Multi-Chain World
articles.description: “This innovation is going to make it so that bridges can scale to secure billions,” said Chainlink founder Sergey Nazarov.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Receives Approval To Be Listed In Japan
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) has recently secured another win in its long repertoire of wins lately. The native coin of Cardano, ADA, has now been approved to be listed in Japan, which features one of the hardest listing requirements in the world. Only a handful of coins have been able to receive approval to be listed on exchanges in Japan, and ADA just became one of them. Japan has always been...

articles.title: Aave is Exploring Solana, Avalanche, Layer 2 Expansion
articles.description: Aave is considering expanding its operations to include Solana, Avalanche, and Layer 2 solutions. This move aims to enhance its decentralized finance offerings and reach a broader user base by tapping into the unique features and benefits of these blockchain networks.

articles.title: Data for DeFi: Switzerland’s Swisscom Joins Chainlink as Node Operator
articles.description: Telecoms like Swisscom want exposure to DeFi and Blockchain without running mining equipment, explains Chainlink Co-Founder Sergey Nazarov

articles.title: Swisscom will become a Chainlink node operator
articles.description: "Making reliable off-chain data available on decentralized networks is a critical success factor for the future development of digital assets,” said Dominic Vincenz.

articles.title: Robinhood stock outruns Bitcoin in intraday crash, down over 10% in pre-market
articles.description: The decline followed Robinhood Market’s announcement that it would sell up to 98 million Class A shares over time.

articles.title: XRP Card to Launch after Recent Uphold and GlobaliD Partnership
articles.description: Two crypto companies are launching a card with XRP cashback via Mastercard

articles.title: "Ethereum Might Flip Bitcoin Market Cap," CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju Says
articles.description: CryptoQuant CEO has discussed upcoming market trends and expressed his thoughts on the future of Ethereum as an institutional investment product

articles.title: Whales Move $1,600,000,000 in Bitcoin and Ethereum, Crypto Quant CEO Says Activity Shows Bears May Be in Trouble
articles.description: Crypto traders are tracking a series of massive Bitcoin and Ethereum transfers. Several whales moved more than $1.6 billion in Bitcoin (BTC) and $570 million in Ethereum (ETH) over a 12-hour period, according to crypto tracker Whale Alert. The largest Bitcoin transfer sent 10,000 BTC from multiple addresses associated with custodial services firm Xapo to […]

articles.title: FTX wallet adds support for BUSD and BNB tokens on the Binance Smart Chain
articles.description: FTX wallets now actively support withdrawals for BUSD and BNB, both native to the Binance Chain, and will soon enable users to make deposits via BSC BEP-20 tokens.

Celsius Network Lends Support to Cardano ($ADA)
articles.description: Cryptocurrency lender Celsius Network is set to add Cardano’s ADA later this month for both borrowing and lending. According to its CEO Alex Mashinsky, users will be able to take out ADA-backed loans on August 19. Mashinsky also revealed on Twitter that users can earn 4.05% on their ADA holdings by lending the cryptocurrency on […]
